actionUnits.condition: TabSimple contains: Tab (MonoBehaviour fileID 904, guid c2bcf79fd38b2441fa17fde42cfce34d) with pagePrefab (guid e749a5bf695bb464390eb1ffd27aba4f) and cachePage=false; UIFadeTransition (MonoBehaviour fileID 903, guid a4ab599ee1dbcea41b165ae5170d9f03) configured with durationSeconds=0.25, transitionInDelaySeconds=0.1875, transitionOutDelaySeconds=0.0. Tab requires a Toggle in a ToggleGroup with a TabGroup on the group object. Triggering Tab.Open() will instantiate/enable the page and invoke UIFadeTransition.TransitionIn(Page.transform). Assumes TabSimple has an EventTrigger/Collider/Rigidbody to allow a Trigger action.
